build_env_note: Mriscoc/PlatformIO environment name only — not the physical chip. Required 512K profile for GD32F303RET6 Neo boards. Do not use STM32F103RC_creality (256K).

validated.mcu_note: Validated for GD32F303RET6 on Creality 4.2.2 Neo via Mriscoc STM32F103RE_creality (512K env name).

caveats: CI placeholder bed/travel/probe values — measure your Duender before trusting limits
Motor invert flags not set — verify after first CoreXY homing
Not a tagged GitHub Release yet — beta smoke-test on hardware before daily use
Wrong build env (256K RC) can brick GD32 Neo boards — see docs/board-mcu.md
